initiatives.name: NextGen Digital Learning Portal Transformation
initiatives.background: The existing academic LMS and registration systems are slow, frustrating students and leading to high dropouts.
initiatives.objective: Deploy a modern single-page Next.js portal integrating course schedules and strategic academic modules.
initiatives.potential_benefits: 40% reduction in enrollment support times, cleaner registration cycles.
initiatives.alignment_strategy: Pillar 1: Advance Technology Mediated, Quality Learning and Teaching
initiatives.impact_description: System will replace primary legacy portals for student-facing web platforms.
initiatives.affected_parties: All academic departments, registry teams, and 200,000+ students.
